info.title: DDBJ Search API
info.description: RESTful API for searching and retrieving BioProject, BioSample, SRA, and JGA entries from DDBJ.

get.description:
Search entries across all database types.

Supports keyword search, organism/date filtering, pagination,
sorting, field selection, and facet aggregation.  Use the ``types``
parameter to narrow the search to specific database types.

parameters.name: keywordFields

schema.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description.
schema.title: Keywordfields

parameters.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Boolean operator for keywords: AND or OR.

parameters.description: Boolean operator for keywords: AND or OR.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).
schema.title: Sort

parameters.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.

parameters.name: includeProperties

schema.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.
schema.title: Includeproperties

parameters.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.

parameters.name: includeFacets

schema.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.
schema.title: Includefacets

parameters.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.

parameters.name: dbXrefsLimit

schema.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per type (0-1000). Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount.
schema.title: Dbxrefslimit

parameters.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per type (0-1000). Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount.

parameters.name: includeDbXrefs

schema.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried.
schema.title: Includedbxrefs

parameters.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried.

400.description: Bad Request (e.g. deep paging limit exceeded).

get.description:
Search bioproject entries.

Supports BioProject-specific filters: organization, publication, grant, umbrella.

parameters.name: keywordFields

schema.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description.
schema.title: Keywordfields

parameters.description: Limit keyword search to specific fields (comma-separated). Allowed: identifier, title, name, description.

parameters.name: keywordOperator

schema.description: Boolean operator for keywords: AND or OR.

parameters.description: Boolean operator for keywords: AND or OR.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).
schema.title: Sort

parameters.description: Sort order as '{field}:{direction}'. Fields: datePublished, dateModified. Direction: asc, desc. Default: relevance (search score).

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Limit response to specific top-level fields (comma-separated). Example: 'identifier,organism,datePublished'.

parameters.name: includeProperties

schema.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.
schema.title: Includeproperties

parameters.description: Include the 'properties' field in the response.

parameters.name: includeFacets

schema.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.
schema.title: Includefacets

parameters.description: Include facet aggregation alongside search results.

parameters.name: umbrella

schema.description: Filter by umbrella status: TRUE or FALSE (case-insensitive).
schema.title: Umbrella

parameters.description: Filter by umbrella status: TRUE or FALSE (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: dbXrefsLimit

schema.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per type (0-1000). Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount.
schema.title: Dbxrefslimit

parameters.description: Maximum number of dbXrefs to return per type (0-1000). Use 0 to omit dbXrefs but still get dbXrefsCount.

parameters.name: includeDbXrefs

schema.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried.
schema.title: Includedbxrefs

parameters.description: Include dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount from DuckDB. When false, both are omitted and DuckDB is not queried.

400.description: Bad Request (e.g. deep paging limit exceeded).

404.description: Not Found (entry does not exist or invalid type).

post.description:
Retrieve multiple entries by their IDs.  Up to 1000 IDs can be specified per request.

**format=json** (default): returns ``{entries: [...], notFound: [...]}``.

**format=ndjson**: returns one entry per line in NDJSON format (Content-Type: application/x-ndjson).  IDs not found are not included in the NDJSON output.

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Response format: 'json' (JSON Array) or 'ndjson' (Newline Delimited JSON).

parameters.description: Response format: 'json' (JSON Array) or 'ndjson' (Newline Delimited JSON).

parameters.name: includeDbXrefs

schema.description: Include dbXrefs from DuckDB. When false, DuckDB is not queried and dbXrefs are omitted.

The response type varies by database type: BioProjectDetailResponse, BioSampleDetailResponse, SraDetailResponse, or JgaDetailResponse.

get.summary: DB Portal unified search (cross-db count / db-specific hits / advanced DSL)
get.description: Unified db-portal search: dispatch by (q/adv) x (db).

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Simple search keyword(s).  Comma-separated for multiple values; double quotes for explicit phrase match; symbols (-, /, ., +, :) trigger automatic phrase match.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Simple search keyword(s).  Comma-separated for multiple values; double quotes for explicit phrase match; symbols (-, /, ., +, :) trigger automatic phrase match.

parameters.name: adv

schema.description: Advanced Search DSL (AP3 + AP6).  Lark LALR(1)-parsed Lucene subset with field-prefixed leaves (``title:cancer``, ``date_published:[2020-01-01 TO 2024-12-31]``, ``organism:"Homo sapiens"``, ``identifier:PRJ*``) joined by ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (case-sensitive, uppercase).  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``description``, ``organism``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``project_type`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Trad ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` etc.).
schema.title: Adv

parameters.description: Advanced Search DSL (AP3 + AP6).  Lark LALR(1)-parsed Lucene subset with field-prefixed leaves (``title:cancer``, ``date_published:[2020-01-01 TO 2024-12-31]``, ``organism:"Homo sapiens"``, ``identifier:PRJ*``) joined by ``AND``/``OR``/``NOT`` (case-sensitive, uppercase).  Tier 1 (cross): ``identifier``, ``title``, ``description``, ``organism``, ``date_published``, ``date_modified``, ``date_created``, ``date``.  Tier 2 (cross): ``submitter``, ``publication``.  Tier 3 (single-DB only): BioProject ``project_type`` / ``grant_agency`` / SRA ``library_strategy`` etc. / JGA ``study_type`` / GEA+MetaboBank ``experiment_type`` / MetaboBank ``submission_type`` / Trad ``division`` etc. / Taxonomy ``rank`` etc.  Errors surface as RFC 7807 problem details with a dedicated ``type`` URI (``unexpected-token`` / ``unknown-field`` / ``field-not-available-in-cross-db`` etc.).

parameters.name: db

schema.description: Target database.  Omit for cross-db count-only.  ``trad`` routes to ARSA (Solr) and ``taxonomy`` to TXSearch (Solr); the other six DBs use Elasticsearch.
schema.title: Db

parameters.description: Target database.  Omit for cross-db count-only.  ``trad`` routes to ARSA (Solr) and ``taxonomy`` to TXSearch (Solr); the other six DBs use Elasticsearch.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination (HMAC-signed, PIT 5 min).
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination (HMAC-signed, PIT 5 min).

schema.title: Response  Search Db Portal Db Portal Search Get

400.description: Bad Request (q/adv exclusivity, cursor exclusivity, DSL parse/validate error, deep paging limit).

502.description: Bad Gateway (all databases failed, or Solr upstream error)

get.summary: Parse Advanced Search DSL into the SSOT query-tree JSON for GUI state restoration.
get.description: Parse ``adv`` DSL and return the SSOT query-tree JSON for GUI restoration.

parameters.name: adv

schema.description: Advanced Search DSL to parse into AST.  Same grammar as ``GET /db-portal/search?adv=...`` (AP3).  Returned JSON tree follows SSOT search-backends.md §L363-381 and is intended for GUI state restoration from shared URLs.
schema.title: Adv

parameters.description: Advanced Search DSL to parse into AST.  Same grammar as ``GET /db-portal/search?adv=...`` (AP3).  Returned JSON tree follows SSOT search-backends.md §L363-381 and is intended for GUI state restoration from shared URLs.

parameters.name: db

schema.description: Validator mode target.  Omit for cross-db mode (Tier 1 only); specify a DB for single-db mode (Tier 1 + Tier 2/3 allowlist).
schema.title: Db

parameters.description: Validator mode target.  Omit for cross-db mode (Tier 1 only); specify a DB for single-db mode (Tier 1 + Tier 2/3 allowlist).

404.description: Not Found (entry does not exist or invalid type).

get.description: Returns service metadata including name, version, and Elasticsearch connectivity status.

BioProjectDetailResponse.title: BioProjectDetailResponse
BioProjectDetailResponse.description: BioProject entry detail with truncated dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount.

BioSampleDetailResponse.title: BioSampleDetailResponse
BioSampleDetailResponse.description: BioSample entry detail with truncated dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount.

BulkFormat.title: BulkFormat
BulkFormat.description: Output format for the Bulk API.

ids.title: Ids
ids.description: List of entry identifiers to retrieve (max 1000).

BulkResponse.title: BulkResponse
BulkResponse.description:
Response for POST /entries/{type}/bulk (format=json).

``entries`` contains the found entries as raw ES documents.
``notFound`` lists IDs that could not be found.

items.title: Items
items.description: Accessions to count linked entries for.

DbLinksCountsRequestItem.title: DbLinksCountsRequestItem
DbLinksCountsRequestItem.description: A single item in the bulk counts request.

DbLinksCountsResponseItem.title: DbLinksCountsResponseItem
DbLinksCountsResponseItem.description: A single item in the bulk counts response.

dbXrefs.title: Dbxrefs
dbXrefs.description: Related entries (sorted by type, then identifier).

count.title: Count
count.description: Hit count (null when error is set).

DbPortalCount.title: DbPortalCount
DbPortalCount.description: A single DB entry in the cross-search count-only response.

DbPortalCountError.title: DbPortalCountError
DbPortalCountError.description: Error reason for a DB entry in the cross-search count response.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: Count per database.  Fixed length 8, fixed order.

DbPortalCrossSearchResponse.title: DbPortalCrossSearchResponse
DbPortalCrossSearchResponse.description:
Cross-database count-only response (8 entries, fixed order).

Order: trad, sra, bioproject, biosample, jga, gea, metabobank, taxonomy.

DbPortalDb.title: DbPortalDb
DbPortalDb.description: Database identifier for db-portal search (8 values).

type.title: Type
type.description: Hit type discriminator (4 JGA entity types).

DbPortalHitJga.title: DbPortalHitJga
DbPortalHitJga.description:
JGA hit (AP6). 4 subtype; subtype-specific fields are optional.

``type`` values: ``jga-study`` / ``jga-dataset`` / ``jga-dac`` / ``jga-policy``.
study_type / grant / publication は jga-study のみ、dataset_type は jga-dataset のみ。

type.title: Type
type.description: Hit type discriminator (6 SRA entity types).

DbPortalHitSra.title: DbPortalHitSra
DbPortalHitSra.description:
SRA hit (AP6). 6 subtype in a single variant; subtype-specific fields are optional.

``type`` values: ``sra-submission`` / ``sra-study`` / ``sra-experiment`` /
``sra-run`` / ``sra-sample`` / ``sra-analysis``. library_* / platform /
instrument_model は sra-experiment のみ、analysis_type は sra-analysis のみ
実値が入る。他 subtype では ``None``。

DbPortalHitTaxonomy.title: DbPortalHitTaxonomy
DbPortalHitTaxonomy.description:
Taxonomy (TXSearch-backed) hit (AP6).

``japanese_name`` は hit 表示スキーマとしては残すが、検索 allowlist への追加は AP6.5
(staging TXSearch の schema luke で field 不在を確認済、plan §リスク #6)。

hardLimitReached.title: Hardlimitreached
hardLimitReached.description: True when total >= 10000 (aligned with Solr hard limit).

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Cursor token for the next page (null on last page).

DbPortalParseBoolOp.title: DbPortalParseBoolOp
DbPortalParseBoolOp.description: Boolean node combining child clauses with AND / OR / NOT.

field.title: Field
field.description: Date field (date_published, date_modified, date_created, or alias 'date').

DbPortalParseLeafRange.title: DbPortalParseLeafRange
DbPortalParseLeafRange.description: Leaf clause for a date range (op='between').

DbPortalParseLeafValue.title: DbPortalParseLeafValue
DbPortalParseLeafValue.description: Leaf clause with scalar value (eq / contains / wildcard).

ast.title: Ast
ast.description: Parsed AST as SSOT query-tree JSON (search-backends.md §L363-381).

DbType.title: DbType
DbType.description: Database types supported by the API (12 types).

EntryListItem.title: EntryListItem
EntryListItem.description:
Summary representation of an entry in search result lists.

The actual fields vary by database type.  Common fields shared by all
types are declared here; type-specific fields are captured by
``extra="allow"``.

EntryListResponse.title: EntryListResponse
EntryListResponse.description: Search result list with pagination and optional facets.

count.title: Count
count.description: Number of entries matching this value.

FacetBucket.title: FacetBucket
FacetBucket.description: A single bucket in a facet aggregation.

type.title: Type
type.description: Entry count per database type (cross-type search only).

Facets.title: Facets
Facets.description:
Facet aggregation results.

Common facets (organism, status, accessibility) are always present.
``type`` is included only for cross-type searches.
``objectType`` is included only for bioproject-type searches.

JgaDetailResponse.title: JgaDetailResponse
JgaDetailResponse.description: JGA entry detail with truncated dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount.

OrganismOut.title: OrganismOut
OrganismOut.description: Organism information (common across all DB variants).

OrganizationOut.title: OrganizationOut
OrganizationOut.description: Submitting organization (nested in BioProject / BioSample / SRA / JGA / GEA / MetaboBank).

page.title: Page
page.description: Current page number (1-based). Null in cursor mode.

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Cursor token for the next page. Null on the last page.

Pagination.title: Pagination
Pagination.description: Pagination metadata (supports both offset and cursor modes).

instance.title: Instance
instance.description: Request path where the error occurred.

requestId.title: Requestid
requestId.description: Request tracking ID (same as X-Request-ID header).

SraDetailResponse.title: SraDetailResponse
SraDetailResponse.description: SRA entry detail with truncated dbXrefs and dbXrefsCount.

UmbrellaTreeEdge.title: UmbrellaTreeEdge
UmbrellaTreeEdge.description: Directed edge in the umbrella tree (BioProject accessions).

query.title: Query
query.description: Resolved primary identifier of the requested BioProject.

edges.title: Edges
edges.description: Unique (parent, child) pairs covering the reachable subgraph.

UmbrellaTreeResponse.title: UmbrellaTreeResponse
UmbrellaTreeResponse.description:
Flat graph representation of a BioProject umbrella tree.

Orphan entries return ``roots == [query]`` and ``edges == []``.

XrefOut.title: XrefOut
XrefOut.description:
Cross-reference entry (dbXrefs / sameAs).

converter 側 XrefType は 22 値 Literal だが、API 側は str で緩く受ける
(converter の XrefType 拡張時に API を同期せずとも動くようにする)。
